title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 34.
content:
There was an old person of Dover,
    Who rushed through a field of blue Clover;
    But some very large bees,
    Stung his nose and his knees,
    So he very soon went back to Dover.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 34."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
